class.help: Mantiene las distintas Areas de la empresa para las ofertas laborales.
class.label: Area
class.name: AREA_LAB

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_area_lab as oi_area_lab, t0.c_area_lab as c_area_lab, t0.d_area_lab as d_area_lab, SEC.policy, t0.c_area_lab as CODE, t0.d_area_lab as TEXT FROM POS05_AREAS_LAB as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Areas_Laborales.AREA_LAB\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_area_lab LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_area_lab asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_area_lab as oi_area_lab, SEC.policy FROM POS05_AREAS_LAB as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Areas_Laborales.AREA_LAB\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_area_lab LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_area_lab asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código de AFJP. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Código
attribute.name: c_area_lab

attribute.description: Descripción de AFJP. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Descripción
attribute.name: d_area_lab

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Areas_Laborales.AREA_LAB.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Areas_Laborales.AREA_LAB.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS05_AREAS_LAB.oi_area_lab) as CNT from POS05_AREAS_LAB Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS05_AREAS_LAB.oi_area_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS05_AREAS_LAB.d_area_lab,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS05_AREAS_LAB.c_area_lab,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
